product_overview: OrçaFácil is a web app to create, customize and manage professional quotes and proposals, from onboarding to client approval. It includes client and service management, a dashboard with metrics, and subscription billing via Stripe.
core_goals: Enable fast creation and management of professional quotes with customizable items, payment options and PDF generation.
Provide an intuitive onboarding experience to seed company data and default services.
Offer full client lifecycle management (B2B/B2C) and a searchable service catalog.
Support public quote approval and in-app notifications to accelerate conversions.
Monetize via subscription plans with Stripe checkout and easy plan management.

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Login, registration, password recovery and update flows backed by Supabase Auth for secure access.
user_flows: Navigate to /app/login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Login button to submit -> See dashboard at /app

Navigate to /app/login -> Click Forgot Password link -> Fill email input field -> Submit reset request -> Receive reset email and Navigate to /app/update-password -> Fill password input field -> Click Update button -> See success confirmation
Navigate to /app/login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field (incorrect) -> Click Login button to submit -> See authentication error message

features.name: Onboarding Wizard
features.description: Multi-step wizard to configure company profile, address and default services after account creation.
user_flows: Navigate to /app/onboarding -> Type company name -> Type company address -> Select default service -> Click Finish button -> See loading/success animation -> Redirect to /app
Navigate to /app/onboarding -> Leave required field empty -> Click Continue button -> See validation error

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Main dashboard showing metrics, quick actions (New Quote, New Client) and recent activity.
user_flows: Navigate to /app -> View business metrics (total quotes, clients, revenue) -> View recent activity feed -> Click New Quote quick action -> Navigate to /app/new
Navigate to /app -> View business metrics -> See loading spinner -> See error banner when metrics fail to load

features.name: Client Management
features.description: Full CRUD for clients with support for B2B/B2C fields, contact details and search.
user_flows: Navigate to /app/clients -> View clients list -> Click New Client button -> Fill client name, email, phone, CNPJ/CPF -> Click Save to create client -> See new client in list
Navigate to /app/clients -> Click on client row to view details -> Click Edit to modify client -> Change email field -> Click Save to update client -> See updated details
Navigate to /app/clients -> Click New Client button -> Fill invalid email -> Click Save to create client -> See validation error

features.name: Quote Management
features.description: Create, edit and manage quotes with items, payment options, warranty settings and PDF export.
user_flows: Navigate to /app/quotes -> Click New Quote button -> Select client from dropdown -> Add item with description, quantity, unit price -> Configure payment options -> Toggle warranty on/off -> Click Save Quote -> Navigate to /app/quotes/[id] -> Click Generate PDF -> See PDF download
Navigate to /app/quotes -> Click New Quote button -> Select client from dropdown -> Click Save Quote without items -> See validation error

Navigate to /app/quotes -> View quotes list with pipeline view -> Filter quotes by status -> Click quote row -> Navigate to /app/quotes/[id]/edit -> Edit quote fields -> Click Save -> See updated quote details

features.name: Quote Approval
features.description: Public-facing page where clients can view a quote and approve it, updating quote status.
user_flows: Navigate to /app/quotes/[id]/approve -> View quote details publicly -> Click Approve button -> See confirmation message -> Quote status updated
Navigate to /app/quotes/[id]/approve -> Click Approve button with expired or invalid link -> See error message

features.name: Profile Management
features.description: Manage company profile, upload logo, customize proposal layout and account settings.
user_flows: Navigate to /app/profile -> Edit company name and address -> Upload company logo -> Click Save -> See updated profile
Navigate to /app/profile -> Upload company logo with unsupported file type -> See upload error

features.name: Service Management
features.description: Manage the catalog of services provided by the company (add, edit, delete).
user_flows: Navigate to /app -> Click Add new service -> Add new service name and price -> Click Save -> See service in catalog
Navigate to /app -> Click Add new service -> Enter negative price -> Click Save -> See validation error
Navigate to /app -> Select existing service -> Click Edit -> Change price -> Click Save -> See updated service

features.name: Notifications
features.description: In-app notification center with bell icon, unread count and actions to mark notifications as read.
user_flows: Navigate to /app -> Click bell icon to see notifications -> View list of notifications -> Click notification to open -> Mark notification as read -> See unread count badge update
Navigate to /app -> Click bell icon to see notifications -> See error message when notifications fail to load

features.name: Subscription & Pricing
features.description: Pricing plans comparison, Stripe checkout flow for upgrades and subscription cancellation management.
user_flows: Navigate to /app/pricing -> View pricing plans comparison -> Click upgrade button -> Complete Stripe checkout -> See subscription active status in profile
Navigate to /app/pricing -> Click upgrade button -> Fail payment during Stripe checkout -> See payment error message
Navigate to /app/profile -> Click Cancel subscription -> Confirm cancellation -> See subscription canceled confirmation

features.name: Global Search
features.description: Command-palette style global search for quick access to clients and quotes.
user_flows: Navigate to /app -> Open search with keyboard shortcut -> Type search query -> View filtered results -> Click result to navigate to selected client or quote
Navigate to /app -> Open search with keyboard shortcut -> Type search query with no matches -> See 'No results found' message

features.name: Support System
features.description: Support widget offering FAQ, ticket submission and feature suggestions with ticket history.
user_flows: Navigate to /app -> Open support widget -> Browse FAQ by category -> Submit support ticket with type and description -> See ticket submission confirmation -> View ticket in ticket history
Navigate to /app -> Open support widget -> Submit support ticket without description -> See validation error

features.name: Folder Organization
features.description: Organize quotes into folders to improve management and filtering.
user_flows: Navigate to /app/quotes -> Create new folder -> Move quote to folder -> See quote listed under the folder
Navigate to /app/quotes -> Create new folder with empty name -> See validation error

features.name: Team Management
features.description: Invite and manage team members for multi-user collaboration and access control.
user_flows: Navigate to /app/profile -> Invite team member -> Fill invitee email -> Click Invite -> See pending invite in team members list
Navigate to /app/profile -> Invite team member -> Fill invalid email -> Click Invite -> See validation error

routes.description: User login page with email and password
Multi-step onboarding wizard for new users
Main dashboard with metrics, quick actions and recent activity
Quotes list with pipeline view and filters
User profile management (company info, logo, settings)
Quote detail view with PDF generation
Public quote approval page for clients
